tasks.instruction: Dopasuj imiona i nazwiska naukowców (1–6) do opisów ich odkryć lub dziedzin nauki (A–H). Dwa opisy zostały podane dodatkowo i nie pasują do żadnego elementu.

options.text: This scientist developed the theory of general relativity and is famous for the equation E=mc², linking energy and mass.
She was a pioneering chemist who discovered two new elements, polonium and radium, and won the Nobel Prize twice.
This English naturalist proposed the theory of evolution by natural selection in his book 'On the Origin of Species'.
He described the laws of motion and gravity, reportedly inspired by watching an apple fall from a tree.
This astronomer was the first to use a telescope to observe the moons of Jupiter and supported the idea that the Earth orbits the Sun.
She discovered the double-helix structure of DNA using X-ray diffraction images, though others received the Nobel Prize for this work.
This scientist classified living organisms into groups and invented the system of Latin names still used in biology today.
He proved that lightning is a form of electricity by flying a kite in a storm and invented the lightning rod.
